features.title: 隐藏聊天区标题栏
features.user_visible_behavior: 将聊天区标题栏隐藏，鼠标靠近时显示
verification: 聊天区标题栏隐藏，鼠标靠近时显示
单元测试，集成测试，e2e测试通过
evidence: CSS: .chat-header hidden by default with opacity:0 + visibility:hidden, shown via .chat-panel:hover .chat-header and .chat-header-visible class (no !important). Removed transform:translateY(-100%) so header stays in layout and is clickable. Trigger zone z-index kept at 1 (removed hover z-index:10) to avoid blocking header clicks.
JSX: ChatPanel.jsx adds isHeaderHovered state, .chat-header-hover-trigger zone at top of chat-panel, onMouseEnter/onMouseLeave handlers on header and trigger zone
Unit tests: 5 tests in test/components/ChatPanelHeaderHideShow.test.js - hidden by default, shows on hover, hides on leave, trigger zone works, click on hidden header toggles API view
E2E tests: Added hover before header click in toggle tests (lines 66, 95) to reveal header before interaction
All 140 unit/integration tests pass (26+2 test suites)

features.title: 模型配置兼容anthropic协议
features.user_visible_behavior: 支持在模型设置中设置anthropic协议的url，通过anthropic客户端发送请求
verification: 根据url格式自动判断协议(openAI/anthropic)，选择对应客户端进行转发
API请求中的msg显示要对应当前使用协议的格式
单元测试，集成测试，e2e测试通过
